subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-12 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: There are those who, after drinking from the cup of true knowledge, say, 'Is there yet any more?' Conversely, there are others who, upon seeing a mirage
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از نفوس آنچه از کأس عرفان مینوشند هل من مزید میگویند بعضی بالعکس بدیدن
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering; rejection of Christ
